submissions.prompt: ScoutClaw Telegram Bridge lets anyone spin up a personal AI agent in under a minute — just create a scoutos.com account, paste your API key into Telegram, and your ScoutClaw is hatched and ready to chat. No dashboards, no config files, no friction. Your agent lives where you already are.
A finance monitoring that handles the reporting of financial metrics across an organization. Design should be modern and simple like Robinhood
A finance monitoring that handles the reporting of financial metrics across an organization. Design should be modern and simple like Robinhood
A finance monitoring that handles the reporting of financial metrics across an organization. Design should be modern and simple like Robinhood
A logistics platform to keep track of shipments and deliveries. Ultra modern and minimalistic
Running app that fat shames you

Create a customer support agent tracking board. This board will allow you to visualize incoming support requests, the agents that have started the conversations, the actions that they took. You can see the whole dashboard of agents and then drill into each detail.
Premium wine tech platform for sommeliers and collectors — cellar management, vintage analytics, tasting notes, auction valuations, and provenance tracking.
A financial education museum — interactive exhibits on market history, economic crises, investment vehicles, and personal finance literacy.
An awards discovery and submission platform — browse live awards programs, track deadlines, submit entries, and manage your recognition portfolio.
A creative studio OS — client projects, mood boards, deliverable tracking, invoice management, and creative brief builder for independent studios.
Contact center supervisor command — live fleet table with human + AI agents unified, SLA 80/20 gauge, HITL authorization tray, Monitor/Whisper/Barge inline controls, wallboard mode.
Funded trader challenge platform — risk gauges (max drawdown, daily loss, profit target), P&L calendar heatmap, equity curve, trade journal, and challenge phase stepper.
Be able to screen and identify the best asset strategy for donors. For use by a non profit fundraiser. Philatelic and financial advisors could use it.

Lead Research Agent
Takes over lead stages require reps to research the
company website, find the lead on LinkedIn, identify industry/category, estimate company size,
and assess fit. Rep pastes in a company name, website URL, and any initial notes. The
agent returns a structured research brief including: company overview, industry/category,
estimated employee count, likely buyer persona match, best sales strategy, ideal lines to use/emails.

An app to match you if you want to have a play date for your child. You can choose and connect with approved play date people. You have time slots that you can pick You can put a number of children that can be involved and other criteria like distance and whatever.
Talent intelligence platform — AI-powered sourcing, candidate pipeline kanban, bento grid dashboard, team analytics, and AI brief generation for enterprise recruiting.
Vinyl record collection app with neo-brutalist design — hard edges, acid yellow accent, flat offset shadows, zero gradients. Counter-trend to bento grid saturation.
